messages.text:
Go/No-Go Qualification
Score win probability & strategic value

🎯 *Aurora Mobility GmbH*
_High-value, well-scoped opportunity that plays directly to TME's integrated strengths — pursue as FLAGSHIP with full commitment and a senior-led team._

🏆 *FLAGSHIP* · 90+ score
📈 Win probability: *High*
🤝 Strategic fit: *Excellent*

Key requirements detected:
◆ Integrate brand, performance and CRM under one accountable lead, with measurable hand-offs and a single source of truth for reporting; the incumbent's siloed setup is a stated pain point and the buyer wants demonstrable de-risking before signature, including data-minimization concerns (§7, §8, App. B).
◆ Produce a scalable creative system concept at pitch stage that visibly bridges brand and performance, and demonstrates modular localization for DACH and wider EU rollouts within the first two work-packages (§4, §5).
• commercial_risk: The performance incentive KPI definitions are not yet specified; without agreed controllable KPI definitions, the hybrid fee model cannot be accurately priced (§10).
